raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"habit","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"I'm having some trouble establishing a consistent wake-up routine.","distilled_fact":"The speaker is having trouble establishing a consistent wake-up routine."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"event","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"I was doing pretty well for a bit, but then I had a big project at work that threw everything off.","distilled_fact":"The speaker had a big project at work that threw everything off after a period of doing pretty well with the wake-up routine."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"habit","confidence":0.9,"matched_text":"I've been trying to get back on track, but it's been tough.","distilled_fact":"The speaker has been trying to get back on track with the wake-up routine."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"activity","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"I recently started taking a morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays, which has forced me to wake up at 6:45 AM on those days, and it's actually been really helpful.","distilled_fact":"The speaker recently started taking a morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"schedule","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"I recently started taking a morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays, which has forced me to wake up at 6:45 AM on those days, and it's actually been really helpful.","distilled_fact":"The morning yoga class has forced the speaker to wake up at 6:45 AM on Tuesdays and Thursdays."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"opinion","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I recently started taking a morning yoga class on Tuesdays and Thursdays, which has forced me to wake up at 6:45 AM on those days, and it's actually been really helpful.","distilled_fact":"The morning yoga class has been really helpful for the speaker."}]}
